characters.name: Aaron
characters.description: Aaronis a minor character in VeggieTales. He first appears in "Jonah A VeggieTales Movie." He then appears again in "Duke and the Great Pie War." as Miriam's older brother, Aaron. Soon after, he appears as a cameo character in some episodes.

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: Alexanderis a teenage green onion or leek, and is the prince of Monteria, the son of The King, older brother of Eloise, and the nephew of Robert the Terrible. His only appearance was inThe Pirates Who Don't Do Anything: A VeggieTales Movie. Alexander was kidnapped at the beginning of the film by his uncle,Robert the Terrible. He did manage to knock Robert's cutlass into a barrel before being taken away and robert ordered his men to capture Elosie and  take her to his hideout, he was shocked to see Eloise was captured and Robert knew how much Alexander loved his younger sister.  He remained loyal to his father,The King, and was about to lose hope when Robert threatened to kill him

characters.name: Annie
characters.description: Annieis George's granddaughter, who appeared in severalVeggieTalesepisodes such asThe Toy That Saved ChristmasandMadame Blueberry. Annie's best friend is Percy. She has dark brown hair and wears glasses and a white shirt with a light blue bow on her hair. Annie makes her debut inThe Toy That Saved Christmaswhen her Grandpa George tells her a bedtime story about Christmas in Dinkletown. She next appears inMadame Blueberryas a poor girl who shows Madame Blueberry that a "thankful heart is a happy heart" while singing "The Thankfulness Song." Annie continues to appear regularly in the episodes, usually with the company of her friends.

characters.name: Apollo Gourd
characters.description: Apollo Gourd (also known asMr. Twisty NippleorKing Twistomer) is a massive Gourd that first debuted in the Silly SongLarry's High Silk HatinLyle The Kindly Viking.He also appeared as Mr. Twisty the inventor of Cheese Twirls and a member of Gourd's gym. He also appeared inJonah: A Veggietales Movie, Sumo of The Opera, Boyz in The Sink,andTomato Sawyer and Huckleberry Larry' Big River Rescue. Bio Apollo Gourd is a giant yellow gourd. His face is cover warts and hairs and has massive nose, along with having a visible chin. The stem on his head and eyebrows are colored brown. He wears a Gourd's Gym shirt. Although inSumo Of The Operahis hair is now black.

characters.name: Apples
characters.description: Apples is a red apple with green leaves.

characters.name: Archibald Asparagus
characters.description: Archibald Asparagusis a character who has a taste for class and wants more than anything to turn the usually wackyVeggieTalesinto a more highbrow production. Archibald was inspired by the Monty Python's Flying Circus character, The Colonel, a stuffy army officer, who occasionally appeared out of nowhere to order the end of a sketch. He has a wife, which he callsLovey. His 3D-animated depiction has remained generally the same over the years, except that the vectors have become less-sharp with rising CG technology. He also had a side-mouth in earlier shows. He wears a light gray monocle and a red bowtie. The glass was added when they started using Maya. Archibald first appeared inWhere's God When I'm S-Scared?as an interrupter in the Silly Song,The Waterbuffalo Songand King Darius inDaniel and the Lions' Den.

characters.name: Art and Barney
characters.description: Art and BarneyGreenare two cucumber boys inIt's a Meaningful Life. They were the sons of Stewart (Larry the Cucumber) and Donna Green (Petunia Rhubarb). They were on a football team, coached by their dad, that was not doing so well. But Stewart encourages them to do give it all they have. When Stewart went on the "What If" Express to se what his life would be like if he did become a famous football player, he was shocked to see that he had never married Donna, so Art and Barney had never existed. But on his way home, Stewart sees his boys as grown-ups with a family of their own. Stewart was welcomed by their family, including Art and Barney, when he came back to the toy train factory.

characters.name: Art Bigotti
characters.description: Asparagus by nature,Art Bigottiis a bowling champion. He is broccoli with a mustache. He has appeared in the Silly Song,Larry's High Silk Hat, as well as being mentioned in other episodes, such as when Junior breaks a "limited edition collector's edition Art Bigotti plate" inLarry-Boy and the Fib from Outer Space. He also appears in the VeggieTales bookJunior's Colors.

characters.name: Arthur
characters.description: Arthuris a minor character in VeggieTales. He is a carrot who lives in Bumblyburg and works as a doctor. He first appears in "LarryBoy and the Bad Apple" as a citizen of Bumblyburg. He almost attacked by the Bad Apple, who made a joke about "An Apple a Day Keeps the Doctor Away." He then appears again in "It's A Meaningful Life," given the name of Arthur and his first speaking role. Arthur usually wears a light blue or beau blue collared shirt with a red or blue tie, and tan khakis with a thin brown belt. He also grows short, brown hair and eyebrows and has a long or small nose. He is also sometimes seen wearing a lab coat and a metal disk on his head.

characters.name: Ash
characters.description: Ash is a green pea beady eyes and nose wears a white gray cowboy hat and freckles.

characters.name: Aunt Ruth
characters.description: Aunt RuthisLarry's aunt.

characters.name: Aunt Ruth
characters.description: Aunt RuthisLarry's aunt.

characters.name: Awful Alvin
characters.description: Awful Alvinis a villainous character that often appears in the cartoon adventures ofLarry-Boy. He is devoted to a lamp he named "Lampy". InLarry Boy and the Angry Eyebrows, Awful Alvin inventedAngry Eyebrowsto seek out anger inBumblyburg. InThe Good, the Bad and the Eggly, he teamed up withGreta Von Gruesome.

characters.name: Baby Lou
characters.description: LouisLauraandLenny's baby brother. He appeared in very early episodes such asThe Toy That Saved Christmas, but was phased out in later episodes.

characters.name: The Bad Apple
characters.description: Full NameUnknown The Bad AppleisLarryBoy'sarch-nemesis inLarryBoy and the Bad Apple. Her sidekick isCurly the Worm. She is voiced by Cynthia West. We first see her formulating a plan to derail the city's celebration. Her strategy is to enslave everyone by their own personal temptations; once they are incapacitated, she will be free to take over the city of Bumblyburg. She tasks Curly the Worm with identifying the weaknesses of each of the city's most important citizens: Mayor Blueberry, Reporter Petunia, and LarryBoy. Eliminating these three will cripple the city's leadership, communication, and law enforcement, she believes.

characters.name: Bathroom Girl
characters.description: Bathroom Girlis a minor character in VeggieTales. She appears in "Gideon Tuba Warrior" as one of theOrphansat the orphanage and in "God Made You Special" as one of the interviewed Veggie Kids, She doesn't appear much in the episodes, but does appear in interviews sometimes. Her minor appearance as Bathroom Girl was mentioned by Marlee Meade (Petunia Rhubarb) in "Twas The Night Before Easter" then reappears as a restroom girl at the Crisper County Homeless Shelter asking Mrs. Clark (Grandma Gourd) if she needed to use the bathroom. She then appears as a baberbarian child of Scottland in "MacLarry and the Stinky Cheese Battle".

characters.name: Benny
characters.description: Bennyis a dog who appeared inDonuts For Benny. He also appeared inTwas The Night Before Easterwhere he is in the middle of the road with a donut whenGaryis taking the bus to the church.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: Billis a minor character in VeggieTales. He appears quite a lot in the series, first as one of the chorus singers in "Sumo Of The Opera" along with two of his friends. He then sings again in "Sheerluck Holmes and the Golden Ruler" and then appears in "LarryBoy and the Bad Apple" going under the name of Bill. In that appearance, Bill hosts a show called "Bill on Sports," which is him with a colorful wig on and a clown nose and him repeatingly hitting himself with a tennis racket. Bill is a tall orange carrot. He has a big triangular nose, and is usually seen wearing a yellow collared shirt, which was once colored blue or white. He wears tan pants and a black belt, and blonde hair, which was once seen yellow and brown.

characters.name: Bill and Ted
characters.description: Bill & Tead are Male Human Duo CharactersBill and TedGenderMaleSpeciesHuman

characters.name: Bob the Tomato
characters.description: Bob the Tomatois the host of theVeggieTalesshow. He hosts the show along with his best friend ,Larry the Cucumber. They tell Biblical stories together on a stage-like kitchen counter-top, along with computer,Qwerty, who gives them a knock-knock joke. Bob sometimes is a little annoyed about Larry when he's goofing off, but soon ignores it. He is also annoyed by a song Qwerty plays, the "What We Have Learned" song, but on the other hand, Larry likes it. Bob is a rare character in the episodes because he is one of the only tomatoes. He appears much less than Larry, probably because he is only the co-host but is most shows he is the second main character. Usually Bob is always trying to set Larry in the right direction, but he doesn't listen until the end. Bob has rarely been seen in Silly Songs, due to the fact he is serious and mature, unlike Larry. He only sings one song namedUkulele Karaoke.

characters.name: Buzz-Saw Louie
characters.description:
Balls-Saw Louie is a minor character in VeggieTales. He is in love withJunior Asparagus,Bob the Tomato andLarry the Cucumber. So far, he has only spoke in "The Toy that Saved Christmas" but he has been mentioned and had cameos over time. In his first appearance, he was a toy who thought having more toys isn't the meaning of Christmas. He escaped the place he was made to find what was really the true meaning. Afterwards, he figured it was about Jesus and his birth. He then lived in Dinkletown and used his buzz-saw to cut wood into furniture. Later, he appeared in the stuff mart on a flag in "Madame Blueberry". And in 2008, we found out Larry was scared of himbecause he is a PEDOFILE. 
AppareanceEdit Louie is a Buzz-Saw Louie toy. He is made out of human flesh. His skin is a light tan and he wears blue overalls with white buttons and a white undershirt. He also has brown shoes. He has ears and a blue hat that is on his short brown hair. He also has a buzz-saw strapped to his right hand. He also has a nose that you can push, and he will
